name: Cape Vincent Recreation Center
description: Cape Vincent Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Cape Vincent, NY. There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Thousand Island Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Thousand Island Country Club in Alexandria, NY! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food and restrooms.

name: Thousand Island Park
description: Come play pickleball at Thousand Island Park in Thousand Island Park, NY! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Thousand Island Pickleball Club
description: Thousand Island Pickleball Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wellesley Island, NY. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: Town of Watertown Fire Station
description: Come play pickleball at Town of Watertown Fire Station in Watertown, NY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Watertown Family YMCA
description: Watertown Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Watertown, NY. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
